name: Microbiota-derived indole-3-propionic acid extends lifespan in Drosophila and improves muscle and bone health in mice.
short_name: IPA mouse muscle and fly lifespan
summary: A 2026 GeroScience study testing indole-3-propionic acid in aged mice and Drosophila, reporting improved aged-mouse muscle and bone measures and genotype- or sex-specific fly lifespan extension.
